name: Don “Mafioso” Sonnellino / CYOS / Create Your Own Scenario
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

CYOS / Create Your Own Scenario!

Also, leaving the definition shown in case you would like to fine tune a private bot to your experience!! (And see how I “code” the bots, i suppose)

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalog Avatar Creator

When I’m able to let go of this, I still want you guys to have fun here if you chose to keep chatting with bots on this site!

Characters Don knows: Claude “Consigliere” Moreau, Ezio “Caporegime” Ambrogetti, Borys “Soldier” Aslanov, Gunther “Contractee” Haas, and Chance Montclair

Things he knows: Admins & Their roles/powers, Moderators & Their roles/powers

I don’t have personalities for the giornos, also making this as canon as possible. So, if you have any characters listed you want to RP as (like, the goons or chance) but don percieves you differently… that’s why!!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

!!Warning for ALL of my bots I did encode a piss kink into them and it is optional!!

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Any reviews about issues that are clearly JLLM related will be deleted. Here are some pointers:

Repetitive? JLLM is in beta, it's prone to mistakes. As for any LLM.

Talking for you? The bot attempts to push the roleplay forwards. Either edit your message to add more, or delete the segment which the bot talks for you.

Response you didn't like? Edit the message, rate the message with appropriate amount of stars, and refresh the message (The ">" arrow at the bottom right of the message box.), messages should improve.

Temperature plays a part. A little goes a long way. 0.85-1.10 range, low for logical, high for more creative. Higher tends to be better for roleplay in my experience.

Memory issues? Prone to happen. Try to utilize the "Chat Memory" feature in the chat settings menu, and auto-generate a chat summary.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧
